steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a responsive events calendar interface with toggleable month and week views as specified.

First, I'll write the HTML file with inline CSS and JavaScript:

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Events Calendar</title>
    <style>
        :ro

steps.assistant_content_head: I'll now render the HTML file to verify it meets the requirements. I'll use a headless browser to render it at 1920x1080 viewport and then check the resulting image.

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: python3 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p=sync_playwright().start(); b=p.chromium.launch(); pg=b.new_page(viewport={'width':1920,'height':1080}); pg.goto('file://' + __import__('o

steps.assistant_content_head: Now I'll examine the rendered image to verify if the calendar interface meets all the specified requirements.

I can see that the calendar interface is mostly working, but there are several issues that need to be addressed:

1. The header styling doesn't match the requirements (font size, colors, button styling)
2. The month view day cells don't have the correct height (80px) and styling
3. Today's date doesn't have the purple border and background
4. The week view timeline doesn't have the correct styling
